title: dicksonia lanata subsp. hispida
intro: Dicksonia lanata subsp. hispida is a type of fern plant, also known as the hairy tree fern, which is a subspecies of the Dicksonia lanata. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dicksonia lanata subsp. hispida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its use is mostly limited to traditional and folk medicine, and more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
